descriptions.text: Too Many Types 2 is a sequel to our silly little reskin hack, Too Many Types. This time around, the Hoenn region has undergone many different changes to make this a unique experience!

Two years after the events of Too Many Types 1 (so basically just Pokémon Emerald), a young boy/girl moves to Lilycove town. This is you! Start out on your adventure and see how Hoenn has been affected by the Kyogre/Groudon disaster two years ago, and meet many different new types!
